quotes: Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.

rules.intent: Maintain visual consistency for structured data across digital and print assets.
rules.rule_text: Infographic and chart containers must use the uniform rounded corners (infographic.panel.radius = 12px) and a Light Blue (color.tertiary.light_blue = #E6F0F9) panel background with a Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) rounded header bar.

effect.reserved_for: emphasis on key figures/data points only
effect.subject: color.cta.svg_orange

quotes: Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only. Placebo/comparator: neutral gray.
Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only. Placebo/comparator: neutral gray.

rules.intent: Preserve data integrity and cognitive structure through standardized color assignment.
rules.rule_text: Charts must use Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) and Sky Blue (color.secondary.sky_blue = #358CCB) as dominant visualization colors. Sunshine (color.primary.sunshine = #faa31b) and Gold (color.primary.gold = #ffc60a) are strictly reserved for key visual emphasis. Placebos or comparator treatments must utilize neutral gray.

quotes: Bars and chart icons: rounded, approachable shapes (rounded bar tops).

rules.intent: Maintain the approachable, organic look-and-feel of the brand system inside technical data visualizations.
rules.rule_text: Bars and data representation icons within charts must feature rounded, approachable shapes (such as rounded bar tops instead of square ends).

quotes: Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), ALL CAPS, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), ALL CAPS, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Standardize brand typography and anchor infographic sections with a recognizable horizontal rule.
rules.rule_text: Chart headlines must be set in ALL CAPS using Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b). Print uses the Agenda (font.family.agenda = 'Agenda') typeface, and email uses Nunito Sans ExtraBold (font.stack.email = 'Nunito Sans'). A thin Gold (color.primary.gold = #ffc60a) rule must reside immediately beneath the headline.

quotes: Statistical callouts: large and bold (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a lighter weight beneath.
Statistical callouts: large and bold (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a lighter weight beneath.

rules.intent: Maintain immediate readability and a clear scanning hierarchy for critical statistical claims.
rules.rule_text: In statistical callouts, the core numerical figure or percentage hero must be sized large and bold, with its supporting copy placed directly beneath in a lighter font weight.

quotes: Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.
Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

rules.intent: Fulfill regulatory compliance requirements concerning clear distinction between promotional data and descriptive footnotes.
rules.rule_text: Footnotes inside charts and infographics must be rendered noticeably smaller (type_scale.footnote = 12px/18px) and clearly separated from the primary scientific data to ensure proper MLR distinction.
